caption: A man with dark hair and a beard, wearing a grey blazer over a white shirt and a lanyard, stands behind a podium speaking at a presentation. To his right is a large screen displaying a slide titled "INDUSTRIAL MACHINE LEARNING" and "HORIZONTALLY SCALABLE DATA PIPELINES WITH AIRFLOW." The slide lists professional roles including "CTO Exponential Technologies," "Chairman The Institute for Ethical AI & ML," "Member, Brouder AI Expert Group European Commission," and "Advisory group TechinsAI," alongside a photo of a man named Alejandro Saucedo and the contact text "CONTACT ME AT: A@E-X.10". At the bottom of the frame, the "europython" logo and the text "Edinburgh 23 29 July 2018" are visible. As the sequence progresses, the man continues speaking, shifting his posture and gesturing slightly with his hands while remaining positioned behind the podium.
